evidence: Vimcal ('Superhuman for calendar') was already operating by 2019, before this April 2020 pitch.
Pitch (2020) and Gamma (2020) launched as slick PowerPoint competitors shortly after this pitch, though not by MFM hosts.
Equals launched as a modern spreadsheet-analytics tool for querying/charting live data, founded around 2020-2021.
Art Money already offered interest-free installment plans for fine art purchases since 2016, before this April 2020 pitch.
Karat Financial, a bank/credit line for creators/influencers, was founded in 2019, before this April 2020 pitch.
Cofertility, offering concierge-level egg freezing support, was founded in 2020 around the time of this pitch.
No specific startup found matching an on-demand scooter delivery service for campus consumer goods.
Established construction project-management/cost-control platforms like Buildertrend (2006) and Procore (2002) already existed at pitch time.
Fleet-management platforms for small trucking businesses such as KeepTruckin (2013) and Samsara (2015) already existed before this pitch.
B-Stock, a B2B bid-based marketplace for used/returned phones and electronics, was founded in 2011, well before this pitch.
